name: data-warehouse-analytics-data-lineage-tracker
description: T185 DataLineageTracker — SCHEMA_REGISTRY archetype. Lineage records are immutable — never update, only append. All records include tenantId. Cross-flow lineage entries identify source flow explicitly.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: immutable append-only lineage records, tenantId in all records, cross-flow entries include explicit sourceFlow identifier
Retrieve SCHEMA_REGISTRY arch pattern + immutable-lineage + append-only + source-flow-explicit + tenant-lineage patterns for T185

Break T185 into: consume data operation event → build LineageRecord with tenantId + sourceFlow + operation + timestamp → storeDocument(lineageRecord) — NEVER updateDocument or deleteDocument on lineage

Generate data-lineage-tracker.service.ts — @EventPattern on data operations, builds immutable LineageRecord: tenantId (from ALS), sourceFlow (explicit flow ID string), operation type, dataEntityRef, timestamp. Uses storeDocument() ONLY. NEVER updateDocument or deleteDocument for lineage records. Cross-flow entries MUST include sourceFlow field identifying originating flow.
Named check validation: append_only_store_document, never_update_lineage, never_delete_lineage, tenant_id_in_record, source_flow_explicit_in_cross_flow
Score generated code 0-100 against T185 iron rules: immutable append, no update/delete, tenantId present, sourceFlow explicit, event-driven
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=append-only+tenant-id+source-flow-explicit, rejected=updateDocument-on-lineage OR missing-tenant-id OR missing-source-flow-in-cross-flow. curriculumTier=1.
